externalDocs.description: Spring Boot Actuator Web API Documentation

get.summary: Get the QA review information of an uploaded dataset for a given id.
get.description: Get the QA review information of uploaded dataset for a given id.Users can get the review information of their own datasets.Admins, judges and reviewer can get the review information for all datasets.

parameters.name: dataId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the dataset.

200.description: Found QA review information corresponding the id.

404.description: Found no QA review information corresponding the id.

post.summary: Assign a QA review status to a dataset.
post.description: Assign a QA review status to a dataset.

parameters.name: dataId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the dataset.

parameters.name: qaStatus
parameters.description: The status with regard to Dataland's quality assurance process.

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Optional comment to explain the QA review status change.

parameters.name: overwriteDataPointQaStatus
parameters.description: Boolean flag. If true, the QA status of the data points are overwritten.

200.description: Successfully assigned QA review status to dataset.

post.description: Upload a new dataset judgement object.

parameters.name: datasetId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the dataset.

201.description: Successfully added dataset judgement object to Dataland.

403.description: Only admins and judges can access dataset judgement objects.

409.description: A pending judgement already exists for this dataset.

200.description: Successfully added QA report to dataland.
Successfully added QA report to dataland.
Successfully added QA report to dataland.

Successfully added QA report to dataland.
Successfully added QA report to dataland.

get.summary: Get the QA review information of an uploaded data point for a given id.
get.description: Get the QA review information of uploaded data point for a given id.Users can get the review information of their own data points.Admins, judges and reviewer can get the review information for all data points.

parameters.name: dataPointId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the datapoint.

200.description: Found QA review information corresponding the id.

404.description: Found no QA review information corresponding the id.

post.summary: Assign a QA review status to a data point.
post.description: Assign a QA review status to a data point.

parameters.name: dataPointId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the datapoint.

parameters.name: qaStatus
parameters.description: The status with regard to Dataland's quality assurance process.

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Optional comment to explain the QA review status change.

200.description: Successfully assigned QA review status to data point.

get.description: Retrieve all QA reports associated to given data point.

parameters.name: dataPointId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the datapoint.

parameters.name: showInactive
parameters.description: Boolean flag to indicate if inactive QA reports should be included in the response.

parameters.name: reporterUserId
parameters.description: The unique user ID of the user who uploaded the QA report.

post.description: The uploaded QA report is added to the database, the generated QA report id is returned.

parameters.name: dataPointId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the datapoint.

201.description: Successfully added QA report to dataland.

post.summary: Triggers a forced upload of a QA Report as a stored QA Report for testing.

403.description: Only admins and judges can access pre-approval configuration.

patch.description: Updates the pre-approval configuration. The sampling probability must be between 0.0 and 1.0.

403.description: Only admins and judges can modify pre-approval configuration.

patch.summary: Change the state of a dataset judgement object.
patch.description: Modify state of the dataset judgement object. Approves or rejects associated data set. Uploads new datapoints and approves them, rejects unneeded datapoints.

parameters.name: datasetJudgementId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the data judgment.

parameters.name: datasetJudgementState
parameters.description: The state of the dataset judgement.

403.description: Forbidden. You must first assign yourself as the judge for this object via the appropriate PATCH endpoint before editing it.

patch.summary: Change the Judge of a dataset judgement object.
patch.description: Set yourself as the judge of the dataset judgement object. Other users cannot modify this object.

parameters.name: datasetJudgementId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the data judgment.

200.description: Successfully set yourself as the judge.

403.description: Only admins and judges can access dataset judgement objects.

patch.summary: Patch judgement details for a data point
patch.description: Updates acceptedSource, companyIdOfAcceptedQaReport and customValue of a data point within a dataset judgement.

parameters.name: datasetJudgementId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the data judgment.

parameters.name: dataPointType
parameters.description: The data point type of the provided data point.

403.description: Forbidden. You must first assign yourself as the judge for this object via the appropriate PATCH endpoint before editing it.

200.description: Successfully marked QA report as active or inactive.
Successfully marked QA report as active or inactive.
Successfully marked QA report as active or inactive.
Successfully marked QA report as active or inactive.
Successfully marked QA report as active or inactive.
Successfully marked QA report as active or inactive.
Successfully marked QA report as active or inactive.

patch.summary: Change the status of a QA report.
patch.description: The specified QA report is marked as active or inactive.

parameters.name: dataPointId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the datapoint.

parameters.name: qaReportId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the QA report

200.description: Successfully marked QA report as active or inactive.

get.summary: Get the number of unreviewed datasets based on filters.
get.description: Get the number of unreviewed datasets based on filters.

parameters.name: dataTypes
parameters.description: The associated reporting framework or data point type (as applicable).

parameters.name: reportingPeriods
parameters.description: The relevant reporting periods (e.g. fiscal years).

parameters.name: companyName
parameters.description: The official name of the company.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the number of unreviewed datasets.

get.summary: Get relevant meta info on datasets.
get.description: Gets a filtered and chronologically ordered list of relevant meta info on datasets.

parameters.name: dataTypes
parameters.description: The associated reporting framework or data point type (as applicable).

parameters.name: reportingPeriods
parameters.description: The relevant reporting periods (e.g. fiscal years).

parameters.name: companyName
parameters.description: The official name of the company.

parameters.name: qaStatus
parameters.description: The status with regard to Dataland's quality assurance process.

parameters.name: chunkSize
parameters.description: Only a chunk of all matching, ordered results is returned. This parameter specifies the maximum size of a single chunk. All chunks except possibly the last will have that size.

parameters.name: chunkIndex
parameters.description: Only a chunk of all matching, ordered results is returned. This parameter specifies which chunk to return, starting at 0. The default value is 0, meaning the first chunk is returned.

get.summary: Get relevant meta info on datasets with QA status pending.
get.description: Gets chronologically ordered list of relevant meta info on datasets with QA status pending. Filtering for company name or ID is possible

parameters.name: companyName
parameters.description: The official name of the company.

get.summary: Get a dataset judgement object by its id.
get.description: Get a dataset judgement object by its id.

parameters.name: datasetJudgementId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the data judgment.

403.description: Only admins and judges can access dataset judgement objects.

get.summary: Get dataset judgement objects by dataset id.
get.description: Retrieve all dataset judgement objects associated with the specified dataset id.

parameters.name: datasetId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the dataset.

403.description: Only admins and judges can access dataset judgement objects.

get.summary: Get metadata of QA reports based on filters.
get.description: Get metadata of QA reports based on filters. Users can search for QA reports posted within a specific time frame, posted by specific uploaders, for QA reports with a specific QA status, or for active QA reports only. The filters can be combined.

parameters.name: uploaderUserIds
parameters.description: The unique user ID of the user who uploaded the QA report.

parameters.name: showOnlyActive
parameters.description: Boolean flag. If true, only active QA reports are included in the response.

parameters.name: qaStatus
parameters.description: The status with regard to Dataland's quality assurance process.

parameters.name: minUploadDate
parameters.description: If set, only metadata of reports that were uploaded after the minUploadDate are returned.

parameters.name: maxUploadDate
parameters.description: If set, only metadata of reports that were uploaded before the maxUploadDate are returned.

parameters.name: companyIdentifier
parameters.description: Unique identifier to find a company.

200.description: Found QA reports for applied filters.

get.summary: Get QA review information for data points filtered by various filters.
get.description: Gets a filtered and chronologically ordered list of relevant QA review information.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier under which a company can be found on Dataland.

parameters.name: dataType
parameters.description: The associated reporting framework or data point type (as applicable).

parameters.name: reportingPeriod
parameters.description: The relevant reporting period (e.g. a fiscal year).

parameters.name: qaStatus
parameters.description: The status with regard to Dataland's quality assurance process.

parameters.name: showOnlyActive
parameters.description: Boolean parameter. If set to true or empty, only currently active data is returned. If set to false, all data is returned regardless of active status.

parameters.name: chunkSize
parameters.description: Only a chunk of all matching, ordered results is returned. This parameter specifies the maximum size of a single chunk. All chunks except possibly the last will have that size.

parameters.name: chunkIndex
parameters.description: Only a chunk of all matching, ordered results is returned. This parameter specifies which chunk to return, starting at 0. The default value is 0, meaning the first chunk is returned.

200.description: Successfully retrieved data point QA review information.

get.description: Retrieve the information about a QA report.

parameters.name: dataPointId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the datapoint.

parameters.name: qaReportId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the QA report

get.summary: Get the content of the data point review queue.
get.description: Retrieves an ordered list of all QA review items currently in status 'Pending' in reverse chronological order.

200.description: Successfully retrieved queue of QA review items for data points.

AcceptedDataPointSource.description: The source from which the value of the data point was accepted.

dataPointType.description: The data point type of the provided data point.

dataPointId.description: The unique identifier of the datapoint.

qaReports.description: List of QA reports associated with this data point, including details about the reporter company.

reporterUserIdOfAcceptedQaReport.description: The unique identifier of the user whose QA report was accepted for this data point, if applicable.

customValue.description: Custom datapoints as json string to be uploaded.

reasonForCustomDataPoint.description: An optional comment explaining why a custom data point was created instead of accepting the original uploaded value or the QA bot suggestion. Only relevant when acceptedSource is Custom; null for all other sources.
reasonForCustomDataPoint.example: The original value was incorrect and the QA report claimed there was no data found.

DataPointJudgement.description: Map with details for all datapoints in the dataset. The key is the datapoint type.

dataPointId.description: The unique identifier of the datapoint.

qaReportId.description: The unique identifier of the QA report

reporterUserId.description: The unique user ID of the user who uploaded the QA report.

uploadTime.description: The timestamp (epoch milliseconds) at which the QA report was uploaded.

active.description: Boolean flag. True if and only if the QA report is marked as active.

comment.example: The data point is correct and hence accepted.

correctedData.description: Contains suggested data corrections for the rejected data point.
